---
title: "Response to Matters Arising by Shimizu et al"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---


This website contains all the code used to generate the findings discussed in our response to Shimizu et al's Matters Arising. 


# Make figure

[Generate panels for figure](MakeFigures.html) - this markdown contains the code used to generate all the panels that went into the figure. Some text edits were made in illustrator. 

The exported pdf files can be found in `output/figures/`


# Processing of datasets 

|**Link to analysis**|**Dataset**|**Description**|
|:------------:|:------------:|:------------:|
|[Wounded - immune cells](Gaudi_Wounded_7dpf_putativeCAM_analysis.html)| Wounded | Gaudi et al dataset available through [GSE270486](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE270486), subset to only include macrophage + neutrophil clusters + re-processing. This includes cell type annotation at this level|
|[Silva et al - re-analysis of public data](Silva_28dpf_makeObject_Level_01_AllCells_Level_02_ImmuneCells.html)| Silva et al (immune) | reprocess publicly available data available through [GSE164772](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE164772) according to author's method description. This data was then also subset to only include myeloid sub populations. This includes cell type annotation at both the all cells, as well as only myeloid cells level|


# Reproducability 

All analysis was performed in R version 4.5.0 and package versions are tracked in renv.lock. If you wish to reproduce these findings, please make sure to download the input files from GEO and place them in `data`. Alternatively, you can download the processed Seurat files in qs2 format from [zenodo](https://zenodo.org/uploads/20604538) and place them in `output/data`.
